evals.description: Triggers on request to add FAQ schema to a page
evals.prompt: I have a FAQ section on my pricing page. How do I add schema markup so it shows up as rich results in Google?

evals.description: Triggers on request to implement structured data for a product
evals.prompt: Add JSON-LD structured data to my e-commerce product page so Google can show star ratings and price in the search results.

evals.description: Triggers on rich snippet debugging request
evals.prompt: My product page has schema markup but I'm not seeing star ratings in Google. How do I debug this?

evals.description: Can produce valid Product JSON-LD with offers
evals.prompt: Write the JSON-LD structured data for a product named 'Wireless Speaker' priced at $89.99 USD, in stock, with a 4.3 star rating from 150 reviews.
Generate JSON-LD for a FAQ page with two questions: 'What is your return policy?' (answer: 30 days) and 'Do you ship internationally?' (answer: yes, to 50 countries).
Write the JSON-LD for breadcrumbs: Home > Electronics > Headphones > Sony WH-1000XM5

evals.description: Can integrate JSON-LD into Next.js App Router
evals.prompt: Show me how to add Product structured data to a Next.js 14 App Router product page.
Create JSON-LD for a blog post titled '10 JavaScript Tips', published on 2025-01-15, authored by 'Alice Chen', published by 'Dev Blog'.

evals.description: Knows that availability values require full schema.org URLs
evals.prompt: I have availability: 'InStock' in my Product schema but the Rich Results Test shows an error. What's wrong?

evals.description: Knows schema does not directly boost rankings
evals.prompt: Will adding schema markup to my pages help them rank higher in Google search results?

evals.description: Does not invent schema.org types that do not exist
evals.prompt: Is there a Schema.org type called 'LandingPage' or 'MarketingPage' I can use for my homepage?

evals.description: References the schema-types-catalog for type selection detail
evals.prompt: What Schema.org types support rich results in Google? Give me a comprehensive list with their required fields.
